scope: Integrate data audit, tactical volatility factors, model parameter update, red-team review, betting gates, and prediction contract v2.

data_quality_audit.markdown: 汇总/预测回测数据质量审计_20260622.md
data_quality_audit.use: Separate quant-complete samples from legacy prose samples; decide which matches are eligible for Brier, log-loss, top3, and WDL-only review.

tactical_volatility.markdown: 汇总/战术波动因子优化_20260622.md

draw_floor_tactical_triggers.model_use: Increase draw-floor and low-event score quality only when tactical triggers co-occur.

event_volatility_triggers.model_use: Adjust score-matrix tail shape for red cards, early goals, keeper extremes, set pieces, and collapse risk.

favorite_ceiling_tail_triggers.model_use: Expand strong-favorite high-score tail only under scenario gates.

model_parameter_update.markdown: 汇总/模型参数优化方案_20260622.md

pass_requirements: Run v2 parameters in shadow mode on the next quant-complete matches.
Log per-match de-duplication between event volatility, tactics, player_state, injury, and market factors.
Keep separate metrics for all-sample, top3-available, and quant-complete subsets.
Prove market-gate compliance before market calibration changes final probabilities.

betting_gates.markdown: 赔率与投注/模型优化后竞彩风险闸门_20260622.md

model_adjustments.draw_floor_dynamic: Enabled only with triggers and caps; primarily reallocates low-score draw mass.
model_adjustments.event_volatility_layer: Enabled as score-distribution tail layer; not a direct xG boost.
model_adjustments.favorite_ceiling_tail: Enabled only under scenario gates; expands high-score tail without automatically raising favorite 1X2.
model_adjustments.market_calibration_split: Direction signal and tail signal are separated; odds missing or same-source gaps block market adjustment.

can_leave_hold_only_if: Latest injuries, suspensions, and minutes risks are captured.
Official China sports lottery odds are captured.
Same-source 1X2, handicap, and totals snapshot is captured with time.

validation.known_remaining_limit: Red-team verdict is revise, so this package is implemented as shadow-mode optimization rather than pass-level permanent default.
